characters.appearance: A young adult with a fair complexion and short, dark brown hair styled in a side part. They have dark eyes, defined eyebrows, and a smooth, unblemished face. Their features are symmetrical and slightly synthetic in appearance.
characters.wardrobe: A light greyish-green, long-sleeved button-down shirt. In the first half, they wear large black over-ear headphones.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, informative, and direct, though slightly stiff in movement.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या आपको भी लगता है कि आपकी English की वजह से आप पीछे छूट रहे हैं? [Do you also feel like you're falling behind because of your English?]
Character A says: Supernova एक ऐसा app है जहाँ आप AI tutor के साथ रोज़ English बोलने की practice कर सकते हैं, बिना किसी झिझक के। [Supernova is an app where you can practice speaking English daily with an AI tutor, without any hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common insecurity of falling behind in career or life due to poor spoken English.
- Introduces Supernova as a safe, judgment-free space to practice with an AI tutor.
- Sets a warm, encouraging, older-sibling tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: क्या आपकी English आपको पीछे रोक रही है? [Is your English holding you back?] Practice speaking with Supernova's AI tutor.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I want to apply for this job. [I want to apply for this job.]
Character A says: Oops, AI ने बताया कि इसे और confidently कैसे बोलें। [Oops, the AI told me how to say this more confidently.]
Character A says: I would love to apply for this role. [I would love to apply for this role.]
Character A says: Perfect! देखा कितना आसान है? [Perfect! See how easy that is?]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करें। [Download Supernova today.]
Character A says: रोज़ practice करें और अपना confidence बढ़ाएं। [Practice daily and boost your confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates a practical, real-world speaking scenario (job interview) rather than just pronunciation.
- Shows the AI providing instant, helpful feedback to improve sentence structure and confidence.
- Delivers a clear call-to-action to download the app and practice daily.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: I want to apply for this job. AI Feedback: Try saying it more confidently! I would love to apply for this role. Perfect! Download Supernova. Boost your confidence.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Closes the ad with a strong visual call-to-action.
- Reinforces the core value proposition of speaking English confidently.
- Removes competitor's specific free trial messaging to align with Supernova's paid model.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Speak English Confidently. Supernova. Download on the App Store.
